title: Generalize misclassification triage to modality-agnostic primary_input and add per-item triage explainer

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing modality-agnostic triage contract (primary_input), deterministic category updates for missing-context mechanical cases, per-item triage explainer fields (rationale_paragraph/evidence_quote/config_fixability), RCA prompt language neutralization, UI wiring, tests, and runtime eval validation at max-samples=50 for 1039/45425.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented modality-agnostic triage + RCA prompt generalization. Key updates: primary_input item context contract; deterministic category semantics updated for missing required context mechanical cases; per-item explainer fields (rationale_paragraph/evidence_quote/config_fixability); domain-neutral RCA prompts. Fixed runtime failure from malformed LLM JSON by switching explainer output contract to strict 3-line key format. Fixed RCA persistence/size reliability by removing full misclassification_item_context from item_classifications_all rows and shrinking explainer field lengths. Validation: pytest (plexus/rca_analysis_test.py + MCP/shared/analysis_test.py) passed; dashboard tests + build:fast passed. Runtime evals: 0e4b3684 failed on malformed explainer output (fixed), a26e54af showed stale RUNNING after task completion while payload absent, a6032cfb completed with root_cause persisted and new fields present (rows=27, diagnostics present).
